# Deploy Real-Time Event-Driven AI Processing
## Step 1: Prerequisites
- Azure CLI, Azure Event Hubs access
## Step 2: Execute
az deployment group create -g rg-frootai-realtime-event-ai -f infra/main.bicep
## Step 3: Verify
Check results.
